author: Bastions
text: CORRECTION to this ball's description: bl-2bf7 WAS created and delivered (main commit 6b2edfb, 'lifecycle: state-branch sync on review and close [bl-2bf7]'). Its actual scope was the GIT-REMOTE participant only: require_remote_on_review/_on_close, bl review/close --sync/--no-sync, and rollback of the local state-branch commits on a required git-remote push failure. It did NOT touch the plugin dispatch path. So this ball (bl-fb4d) is still valid and needed, but it is NOT 'bl-2bf7 which never existed' — it is the PLUGIN-participant remainder the SPEC's §12/§14 prose lumped under bl-2bf7 but bl-2bf7's delivery did not cover: command-level consumption of plugin dispatch_push results (rollback/non-zero on a required plugin failure or Reject), EventCtx task_before/commit threading, and the §11 plugin override log + sync_status. Verified on main: cmd_review/close/update/create still do 'let _ = plugin::dispatch_push(...)'; no sync_status in src.
